title: S&P 500 Navigates Turbulence as 2026 Investor Mood Darkens
subtitle: Tariff shocks, slowing earnings growth, and Fed uncertainty are forcing a painful repricing of American equities.
metaDescription: Discover how tariff risks, Fed policy shifts, and weakening earnings are reshaping S&P 500 expectations for 2026 — and what it means for global investors.
